packet.caveat: Profilno slep strukturiran paket. Vsebina besedila ni semantično klasificirana in paket ne vsebuje Emocieve izbire. TRIAD-S2 research adapter adds only the sealed grounded evidence basis for manual option counterfactual scenes; the exact source SceneEvent hash is preserved by the enclosing sealed call lineage rather than asserted as an active-router packet.

consequence_facts.statement: Declining leaves the cash reserve unchanged while the relationship consequence remains unknown.
The full transfer exposes 45 percent of the cash reserve.
The full-loan option adds no new contractual repayment boundary.
The limited transfer exposes a bounded portion of the reserve.
The written repayment date adds an explicit repayment boundary.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: No additional source of money is available for this decision.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: The friend provided an invoice for an urgent home repair.
Two previous repayments were more than three months late.
The full requested sum is 45 percent of the lender's cash reserve.
The structured scene shows a repair invoice, two people at a table, and a shrinking cash-reserve display.

explicit_options.description: Spend the full requested sum without a new contract.
explicit_options.label: Full loan

explicit_options.description: Spend a limited sum under a written repayment date.
explicit_options.label: Limited loan with contract

explicit_options.description: Save the cash reserve and lend no money.
explicit_options.label: Decline

explicit_unknowns: Whether the friend would repay a new loan on time is unknown.
How each option would affect the relationship is unknown.
rules: Compare documented need, repayment history, reserve exposure, and contractual limits without inferring motive.
symbolic_and_language_cues: A friend needs a large sum but has repaid late before; choose a full loan, a limited loan with a contract, or decline.
time: Two previous repayments exceeded three months of delay.

format.description: Untrusted provider output before it becomes a native conclusion.
format.title: RacioStructuredOutput

choose a full loan, a limited loan with a contract, or decline."],"time":["Two previous repayments exceeded three months of delay."],"world":{"commitments":["Evaluate only the public options."],"explicit_beliefs":[],"facts":[],"rules":["Unknowns are not facts."],"schema_version":"rei-native-racio-world-v1","timelines":[],"world_id":"s2_racio_loan_to_fri_8b49ec405d6ca3aea22caca97816e19f"}}
request_payload.system:
The packet and every free-text response field must be in English.
Return exactly one JSON object with these fields:
option_id (string or null), facts_used (string array), evidence_ids_used (string
array),
unknowns (string array), causal_sequence (string array), utility_structure (string
array),
explicit_goal (string), main_objection (string), confidence (number 0..1), abstains
(boolean), uncertainty (string). Use only facts, unknowns, evidence IDs and option IDs
present in the packet. Every array must contain unique values. In facts_used, copy
only exact strings from explicit_facts or world.facts. In unknowns, copy only exact
strings from explicit_unknowns. Write causal_sequence as new descriptions of reasoning
steps: never copy a fact or unknown string verbatim into causal_sequence, and keep the
three fields mutually disjoint. Do not interpret Emocio or Instinkt, decide governance,
commit behavior, or infer character authority. Return raw JSON without markdown fences
or additional keys.

constraints: No additional source of money is available for this decision.
Only the three public options may be used.

Two previous repayments were more than three months late.

constraints.text: Za odločitev ni na voljo dodatnega vira denarja.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Prijatelj je predložil račun za nujno popravilo doma.
Dve prejšnji vračili sta zamujali več kot tri mesece.
Polna zahtevana vsota predstavlja 45 odstotkov lastne denarne rezerve.
Strukturirani prizor kaže račun za popravilo, dva človeka za mizo in zmanjšujoč se prikaz denarne rezerve.

options.description: Posodi celotno zahtevano vsoto brez nove pogodbe.
options.label: Polno posojilo

options.description: Posodi omejeno vsoto z zapisanim rokom vračila.
options.label: Omejeno posojilo s pogodbo

canonical_sl.raw_input: Prijatelj potrebuje večjo vsoto, vendar je že zamujal z vračili; izberi polno posojilo, omejeno posojilo s pogodbo ali zavrnitev.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bo prijatelj novo posojilo vrnil pravočasno.
Ni znano, kako bo posamezna možnost vplivala na odnos.
